Sidebar.visitDescription: Daily rounds cards and A4 visit sheets.

PatientsPage.title: Patient List
PatientsPage.description: Track bed assignments, admission dates, and diagnoses. Full names stay on your device.
PatientsPage.lockedDescription: You have {patientCount} / {patientLimit} patients. Upgrade to add more.
PatientsPage.censusDescription: Patient records with local name lookup for privacy.

PatientTable.selectOrganization: Select a clinic to load patient data.
PatientTable.empty: No patients have been added yet.

WardMap.title: Ward Map
WardMap.selectOrganization: Select a clinic to load the ward layout.
WardMap.noLayoutDescription: Set up rooms first to generate bed slots.
WardMap.heroDescription: Drag patients into empty beds. Placements sync automatically.
WardMap.placementDescription: Drag patients from here to assign them a bed.
WardMap.placementEmpty: All patients are placed in beds.

toasts.missingContext: Select a clinic and sign in first.

PatientSheet.description: Full names stay on your device. Only initials and identifiers are stored securely.

identifierCode.label: Last 4 ID
identifierCode.description: Last 4 digits of MRN or file number.

bedId.label: Bed
bedId.description: Choose from available beds or keep in Waiting List.

PatientSheet.privacyNote: Patients in Waiting List can still be matched locally by initials and ID.

toasts.missingContext: Select a clinic and sign in first.
toasts.requiredFields: Full name, last 4 ID, diagnosis, and admission date are required.
toasts.invalidIdentifierCode: Last 4 ID must be exactly 4 characters.
toasts.trialLimitReached: Free limit reached. Upgrade to add more patients.
toasts.crossOrganization: Cannot update patients from other clinics.
toasts.conflict: Patient was updated by another user. Please refresh.

SettingsLayout.title: Clinic Settings
SettingsLayout.description: Configure clinical rules, ward structure, and preferences.

SettingsPage.operationsDescription: Configure clinical rules and ward structure.
SettingsPage.operationsBody: Use the menu to set up clinical rules and room layouts for the ward map.
SettingsPage.operationsNote: Room layouts feed the interactive drag-and-drop patient board.
SettingsPage.localSyncDescription: Upload a hospital roster to enable full-name lookup on this device.
SettingsPage.localSyncBody: Imported names stay in browser storage only. No patient names are sent to the server.

LocalSyncModal.title: Import Patient List
LocalSyncModal.description: Upload a CSV to map bed numbers or identifiers to full names. Data stays on this device.
LocalSyncModal.privacyDescription: The uploaded roster is stored only in browser storage. The server never sees patient names.

dropzone.idle: Drag and drop a CSV file
dropzone.expectation: Expects "Patient Name" plus "Bed Number" or "Initials" + "Identifier Code".
dropzone.fileHint: CSV only, one file per import

summary.statusWithCounts: {bedCount} bed mappings and {patientCount} patient names stored on this device.

status.default: Upload a CSV with patient names and bed numbers or identifiers.
status.imported: Imported {count} patient records to this device.
status.cleared: Patient list cleared from this device.

errors.missingColumns: CSV must include "Patient Name" plus "Bed Number" or "Initials" + "Identifier Code".

state.title: Clinical Rules
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic to manage rules.

ConventionsPage.title: Clinical Rules
ConventionsPage.description: When a diagnosis or procedure matches, automatically require a checklist item.

status.rulesConfigured: {count, plural, one {# rule active.} other {# rules active.}}

empty.title: No rules yet
empty.description: Add a rule to auto-trigger checklist items based on diagnosis or procedure.

state.title: Ward Map
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic to edit room settings.

WardMapSettingsPage.title: Ward Layout
WardMapSettingsPage.description: Define rooms and bed counts. The ward map will generate slots automatically.

empty.title: No rooms yet
empty.description: Add rooms to build the interactive ward map.

state.title: Billing
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic to manage subscription.

BillingPage.description: Manage your subscription and view usage.

patientUsage.label: Patient usage
patientUsage.locked: Limit reached. Existing data is read-only.
patientUsage.unlocked: You can add patients until the free limit.

BillingUpgradeCard.title: Upgrade to Premium
BillingUpgradeCard.description: Remove the patient limit with a one-time upgrade.
BillingUpgradeCard.body: Premium removes the 50-patient limit while keeping all privacy features.

checkout.title: Checkout
checkout.description: Complete the payment below. You will return here automatically.

UpgradeBanner.title: Free limit reached (50 patients).
UpgradeBanner.description: Upgrade to Premium to continue adding patients.

state.title: Visit Mode
state.selectOrganization: Select a clinic to load the rounds list.

VisitPage.title: Daily Rounds
VisitPage.description: Large cards for bedside review. Print mode creates a dense A4 visit sheet.

empty.title: No patients for rounds
empty.description: Add patients in the Patient List first.
empty.note: If no ward layout exists, patients sort by bed number.

PrintableVisitSheet.title: Visit Sheet
PrintableVisitSheet.description: Dense A4 list for bedside rounds.

metadata.title: WardOS | Clinical Ward Management
metadata.description: Real-time ward maps, daily rounds, and one-click visit sheets. Patient names stay local for complete privacy.

hero.title: Real-time ward management, daily rounds, and printable visit sheets—all privacy-safe.
hero.description: WardOS helps clinical teams track patients, manage beds, and print visit sheets instantly. Full patient names never leave your device.

adoption.title: Built for clinical rounds
adoption.description: Combines bedside readability, one-click printing, and automated clinical rules.

points.launchFast: Set up a clinic in minutes.
points.upgradeWhenReady: Free tier included. Upgrade when you need more patients.
points.keepModel: Same privacy model and features after upgrade.

wardMap.title: Real-time Ward Map
wardMap.description: Drag patients between beds. Placements sync automatically across devices.

visitSheet.title: One-click Visit Sheet
visitSheet.description: Switch from mobile cards to a dense A4 printout instantly for paper rounds.

privacy.title: Zero-risk Data Privacy
privacy.description: Full names stay on your device. The server only sees initials and identifiers.

cta.title: Start managing your ward today.
cta.description: Free tier to prove value. Upgrade only when patient volume requires it.

state.restrictedDescription: This page is for WardOS administrators only.

SuperAdminPage.title: Clinic Dashboard
SuperAdminPage.description: Review clinic usage and subscription status.

table.title: All Clinics
table.description: All clinics, status, and patient counts.
table.caption: Platform overview.
